Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Cross-Defendant Augusto De La Torre.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to Cross-Defendant Augusto Jose de la Torre.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John N. Carr, Esq. appeared with defendant and cross-complainant Shah Bharat, who was placed under oath and examined.
Mr. Carr also appeared for defendant and cross-complainant Bhavana Bharat, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by cross-defendant Augusto Jose de la Torre.
Default was entered against cross-defendant on January 16, 2008.
Roe defendants were dismissed January 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of cross-complainants Shah Bharat and Bhavana Bharat, and against the Defaulted Cross-Defendant Augusto Jose de la Torre as follows:

Damages/Principal - $75,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $75,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
